input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.1.3
            TITLE: the etc system may blip the throttle during downshifts when proven that unintended

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.1.3: The ETC system may blip the throttle during downshifts when proven that unintended
IC.4.1.3 The ETC system may blip the throttle during downshifts when proven that unintended 
acceleration can be avoided.  The functional analysis must be documented in the ETC Systems 
Form
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 81 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The ETC system may blip the throttle during downshifts when proven that unintended acceleration can be avoided. The functional analysis must be documented in the ETC Systems Form Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International Page 81 of 140 Version 1.0 1 Sep 2023
